hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Have a question, need support, or want to discuss a project? We're here to help. Fill out the form below or use our quick contact options.

trustIndicators.title: Secure & Private
trustIndicators.description: Your information is encrypted and never shared

trustIndicators.title: Quick Response
trustIndicators.description: We respond to all inquiries within 24-48 hours

trustIndicators.title: Expert Support
trustIndicators.description: Our team is here to help with any questions

trustIndicators.title: Confirmation Email
trustIndicators.description: Receive instant confirmation of your inquiry

faqTeaser.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqTeaser.description: Find quick answers to common questions about our services, pricing, and processes.

items.question: What areas do you cover?
items.answer: We provide services across London and the surrounding areas within the M25.

items.question: How quickly can you respond?
items.answer: Emergency calls are prioritized. Standard inquiries receive a response within 24-48 hours.

items.question: Do you offer free quotes?
items.answer: Yes, we provide free, no-obligation quotes for all residential and commercial projects.

items.question: Are you certified?
items.answer: All our electricians are NICEIC registered and fully insured for your peace of mind.
